text:
Charles Dumarque is the father of Rosalie Dumarque, and a general in the Military Police.

Appearance

Charles is a middle-aged man who is typically dressed in a full officer's uniform of the Military Police. As a noble of his standing, his uniform is neatly pressed with every medal polished to a mirror's gleam. He also has thinning golden hair.
